title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

subtitle.text: Faigh oidis ó thíortha ar fud an domhain
subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

heroTitle.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

heroSubtitle.text: Brabhsáil oidis bhunaidh ó chistineacha ar fud an domhain
heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

featuredTitle.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

ramenDescription.text: Broth cnámh muice saibhir le chashu bog, ubh bogbhruite, agus núdail úr.
ramenDescription.description: Cur síos ar oidis Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaDescription.text: Píotsa Neapolitan clasaiceach le trátaí San Marzano, mozzarella úr, agus basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Cur síos ar oidis Píotsa Margherita.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos muice marinated le pina, cilantro, agus oinniún ar tortillaí arbhar.
tacosDescription.description: Cur síos ar oidis Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenDescription.text: Cearc bog i anlann trátaí uachtarach agus im le spíosraí boladhach.
butterChickenDescription.description: Cur síos ar oidis Cearc Im.

padThaiDescription.text: Núdail ríse friochta le smábha, tofu, peanuts, agus anlann tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Cur síos ar oidis Pad Thai.

crepesDescription.text: Crêpes tanaí, mín líonta le Nutella, sútha talún úr, agus uachtar gealaithe.
crepesDescription.description: Cur síos ar oidis Crêpes Francacha.

label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
